description: In total, only 12 examples of the lightweight Evo VI RS Sprint were produced, Its inline-four engine has been tuned by Ralliart, now featuring a titanium turbocharger, a modified ECU, ARP Racing conrod bolts, a HKS exhaust system and HKS air filters. Designed with the rally stage in mind, the car also features shorter gear ratios and a a quicker steering rack.
creator: Bnuuy
